title: Moderation Update – April 29, 2026
body: We reviewed 6 community reports today (3 high, 2 medium, 1 low). Actions taken on high-severity cases: • spam_wave_42 — BANNED for posting phishing links across multiple channels. • toxic_runner — BANNED for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. • report_006 (core_maintainer) — Closed as false positive; mass-reported by brigading users after a legitimate moderation decision. The remaining 3 reports (medium/low severity) are under review. Thank you for helping keep our community safe.
